case_title: TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION VS. COMEX CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT ORIGINAL CONTRACT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION

CAUSE CALLED, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COMEX CORPORATION POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: 4 KONICA B/W CAMERAS W/ LENSES AND MOUNTS;ONE 17"ULTRAK HIGH RES B/MONITOR;, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $300.00, THE VALUE OF SAID PROPERTY, $4,272.24 DAMAGES, $775.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $136.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,183.24, INTEREST $77.22, FOR A TOTAL JUDGMENT OF $5260.46. ALSO ONE 168 HR(SONY) T.L. VCR; TEN BLANK T.L. VIDEO TAPES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT COMEX CORPORATION
AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $136.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT COMEX CORPORATION
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT EQUIPMENT VALUATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT COMEX CORPORATION DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          APR-05-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-01-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-08-2002
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION SERVED DEC-14-2001, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COMEX CORPORATION
STATUS CONFERENCE OF APR-05-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ENTERED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
